How to Download from Spotify?
1
Copy the Spotify URL

Firstly, open the Spotify app on your device or the Spotify website. Now, copy the URL of your favorite song, playlist, album, or artist that you want to download.

2
Paste the URL

Go back to the Spotdown website, which is an online Spotify downloader tool. Now, paste the copied link in the input field that is provided above. You

How to Download Albums from Spotify?
1
Copy the Spotify URL

First of all, open the album on the Spotify app that you want to download and copy its link.

2
Paste the URL

Now, paste the copied link in the URL field. You can also use the paste button to paste the copied link.

3
Click Download

How to Download Playlists from Spotify?
1
Copy the Spotify URL

First of all, open your favorite Spotify playlist that you want to download and copy its link.

2
Paste the URL

Paste the copied playlist link in the URL field that is given above.

3
Click Download

Simply hit the 'Download All' button to start downloading all playlist songs at once. You can also choose any song from the playlist and download it.
